name: artemisia annua
title: best benefits of artemisia annua
description: Artemisia annua reduces fever, which is a decrease in body temperature above normal due to illness or infection. This benefit is important as fever can be life-threatening in certain cases, such as in people with weakened immune systems or those with severe infections like malaria, which can lead to serious complications if not managed properly. The artemisia annua plant's ability to reduce fever is attributed to its bioactive constituents, including artemisinin, which is a potent anti...
